<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ru">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>🍉 Приглашение на арбуз</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Pacifico&family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { height: 100%; }
  body {
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: #fef2f2;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    padding: 1rem;
  }
  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, rgba(254,202,202,0.6) 0%, transparent 50%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 80% 80%, rgba(187,247,208,0.5) 0%, transparent 50%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 60% 10%, rgba(253,224,71,0.2) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }
  .seed {
    position: fixed;
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.5rem);
    opacity: 0.07;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
    animation: floatSeed linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes floatSeed {
    0% { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; }
    10% { opacity: 0.07; }
    90% { opacity: 0.07; }
    100% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(360deg); opacity: 0; }
  }
  .card {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-radius: 32px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(252,165,165,0.5);
    padding: 2rem 1.75rem 1.75rem;
    max-width: 380px;
    width: 100%;
    text-align: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(220,38,38,0.1), 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) both;
  }
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px) scale(0.96); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  }
  .stripe {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 6px;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #dc2626 0px, #dc2626 20px, #16a34a 20px, #16a34a 40px, #fbbf24 40px, #fbbf24 60px);
    border-radius: 32px 32px 0 0;
  }
  .wm-emoji {
    font-size: 4.5rem;
    display: block;
    margin: 0.5rem auto 0.3rem;
    animation: wmbounce 2.2s ease-in-out infinite;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 6px 12px rgba(220,38,38,0.25));
  }
  @keyframes wmbounce {
    0%,100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(-3deg); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(3deg); }
  }
  h1 {
    font-family: 'Pacifico', cursive;
    font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 5vw, 1.8rem);
    color: #dc2626;
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }
  .tagline {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: #9ca3af;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    margin-bottom: 1.3rem;
  }
  .photo-wrap {
    position: relative;
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    margin: 0 auto 1.2rem;
  }
  .photo-ring {
    position: absolute;
    inset: -5px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 3px solid transparent;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626, #16a34a, #fbbf24, #dc2626) border-box;
    -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) padding-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
    -webkit-mask-composite: destination-out;
    mask-composite: exclude;
    animation: spin 4s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
  .photo-wrap img {
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    border: 3px solid #fff;
  }
  .badge {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -2px;
    right: -2px;
    background: #dc2626;
    color: #fff;
    border-radius: 50%;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    border: 2px solid #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(220,38,38,0.4);
  }
  .invite-text {
    font-size: 0.93rem;
    color: #374151;
    line-height: 1.65;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }
  .invite-text strong { color: #dc2626; font-weight: 700; }
  .details-box {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff7f7, #f0fdf4);
    border-radius: 18px;
    border: 1.5px dashed rgba(220,38,38,0.3);
    padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    text-align: left;
  }
  .detail {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 5px 0;
    font-size: 0.87rem;
    color: #4b5563;
    border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(220,38,38,0.12);
  }
  .detail:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .detail-icon { font-size: 1.1rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .rsvp-btn {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626, #b91c1c);
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 0.75rem 2rem;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    cursor: pointer;
    width: 100%;
    transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(220,38,38,0.4);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .rsvp-btn::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }
  .rsvp-btn:hover::after { transform: translateX(0); }
  .rsvp-btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); }
  .rsvp-btn.done { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #16a34a, #15803d); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(22,163,74,0.4); }
  .player {
    background: #fff7f7;
    border-radius: 16px;
    border: 1px solid #fecaca;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  }
  .player-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }
  .play-btn {
    width: 42px; height: 42px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #dc2626;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(220,38,38,0.35);
    transition: transform 0.1s, box-shadow 0.1s;
  }
  .play-btn:active { transform: scale(0.92); }
  .play-icon { width:0; height:0; border-style:solid; border-width:8px 0 8px 14px; border-color:transparent transparent transparent #fff; margin-left:3px; }
  .pause-bars { display:none; gap:4px; align-items:center; }
  .pause-bar { width:4px; height:15px; background:#fff; border-radius:2px; }
  .song-info { flex: 1; text-align: left; }
  .song-name { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; color: #dc2626; }
  .song-label { font-size: 0.72rem; color: #9ca3af; }
  .bars { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 2px; height: 22px; }
  .bar { width: 3px; background: #fca5a5; border-radius: 2px; animation: barwave 0.8s ease-in-out infinite; }
  .bar:nth-child(1){height:8px;animation-delay:0s}
  .bar:nth-child(2){height:14px;animation-delay:0.1s}
  .bar:nth-child(3){height:10px;animation-delay:0.2s}
  .bar:nth-child(4){height:18px;animation-delay:0.15s}
  .bar:nth-child(5){height:12px;animation-delay:0.25s}
  .bar:nth-child(6){height:7px;animation-delay:0.05s}
  @keyframes barwave{0%,100%{transform:scaleY(0.4)}50%{transform:scaleY(1)}}
  .bars.stopped .bar{animation-play-state:paused;transform:scaleY(0.4)}
  .confetti-wrap{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:999;overflow:hidden}
  .cf{position:absolute;top:-10px;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;animation:cffall linear forwards}
  @keyframes cffall{0%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg);opacity:1}100%{transform:translateY(110vh) rotate(720deg);opacity:0}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="confetti-wrap" id="confettiWrap"></div>

<div class="card"><div class="stripe"></div><span class="wm-emoji">🍉</span><h1>Приглашение на арбуз!</h1><p class="tagline">✨ самое сладкое лето начинается здесь ✨</p><div class="photo-wrap"><div class="photo-ring"></div><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="фото" /><div class="badge">🍉</div></div><p class="invite-text">
  Привет, милый человечек! 🌸<br><br>
  Я хочу пригласить тебя на <strong>арбузное свидание</strong>.<br>
  Разрежем самый большой арбуз, запачкаем руки в соке и будем считать косточки под летним солнышком ☀️
</p>
<div class="details-box">
  <div class="detail"><span class="detail-icon">📅</span><span>Когда тебе удобно</span></div>
  <div class="detail"><span class="detail-icon">📍</span><span>Там, где вкуснее всего</span></div>
  <div class="detail"><span class="detail-icon">🎁</span><span>Ничего не нужно, только ты</span></div>
  <div class="detail"><span class="detail-icon">👗</span><span>Можно запачкать одежду</span></div>
</div>
<button class="rsvp-btn" id="rsvpBtn" onclick="doRsvp()">Я приду! 🍉</button>
<div class="player">
  <div class="player-row">
    <button class="play-btn" id="playBtn" onclick="toggleMusic()" aria-label="Воспроизвести">
      <div class="play-icon" id="playIcon"></div>
      <div class="pause-bars" id="pauseBars"><div class="pause-bar"></div><div class="pause-bar"></div></div>
    </button>
    <div class="song-info">
      <div class="song-name">Арбузный джем 🍉</div>
      <div class="song-label">летнее настроение</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bars stopped" id="bars">
      <div class="bar"></div><div class="bar"></div><div class="bar"></div>
      <div class="bar"></div><div class="bar"></div><div class="bar"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<script>
const seeds=['🍉','🌿','🌸','💚','🌱'];
for(let i=0;i<18;i++){
  const s=document.createElement('div');
  s.className='seed';
  s.textContent=seeds[i%seeds.length];
  s.style.left=Math.random()*100+'vw';
  s.style.animationDuration=(8+Math.random()*14)+'s';
  s.style.animationDelay=(-Math.random()*20)+'s';
  s.style.fontSize=(0.8+Math.random()*1.4)+'rem';
  document.body.appendChild(s);
}

let audioCtx, playing=false, gainNode;

function makeCtx(){
  if(!audioCtx) audioCtx=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
}

function note(freq,start,dur,vol=0.3,type='sine'){
  const o=audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const g=audioCtx.createGain();
  o.type=type; o.frequency.value=freq;
  o.connect(g); g.connect(gainNode);
  const at=start;
  g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,at);
  g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(vol,at+0.04);
  g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,at+dur);
  o.start(at); o.stop(at+dur+0.01);
}

const melody=[
  [523.25,0],[659.25,0.3],[783.99,0.6],[1046.5,0.9],
  [783.99,1.3],[659.25,1.6],[523.25,1.9],[440,2.2],
  [523.25,2.7],[587.33,3.0],[659.25,3.3],[783.99,3.6],
  [659.25,4.0],[587.33,4.3],[523.25,4.6],[440,4.9],
  [392,5.4],[440,5.7],[523.25,6.0],[659.25,6.3],
  [523.25,6.7],[440,7.0],[392,7.3],[329.63,7.6],
  [392,8.1],[440,8.4],[523.25,8.7],[659.25,9.0],
  [783.99,9.4],[659.25,9.7],[523.25,10.0],[440,10.3]
];
const LOOP=10.8;

let loopTimer=null;
function scheduleLoop(t){
  if(!playing)return;
  melody.forEach(([f,offset])=>{
    note(f,t+offset,0.28,0.3,'sine');
    note(f*2,t+offset,0.13,0.07,'triangle');
  });
  const ms=(t+LOOP-audioCtx.currentTime-0.25)*1000;
  loopTimer=setTimeout(()=>scheduleLoop(t+LOOP),Math.max(ms,50));
}

function toggleMusic(){
  makeCtx();
  if(audioCtx.state==='suspended')audioCtx.resume();
  playing=!playing;
  const pi=document.getElementById('playIcon');
  const pb=document.getElementById('pauseBars');
  const bars=document.getElementById('bars');
  if(playing){
    gainNode=audioCtx.createGain();
    gainNode.gain.value=0.55;
    gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    pi.style.display='none'; pb.style.display='flex';
    bars.classList.remove('stopped');
    scheduleLoop(audioCtx.currentTime+0.05);
  } else {
    clearTimeout(loopTimer);
    if(gainNode){gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,audioCtx.currentTime+0.3);}
    pi.style.display='block'; pb.style.display='none';
    bars.classList.add('stopped');
  }
}

function doRsvp(){
  const btn=document.getElementById('rsvpBtn');
  btn.textContent='🎉 Ура, жду тебя!';
  btn.classList.add('done');
  spawnConfetti();
}

function spawnConfetti(){
  const wrap=document.getElementById('confettiWrap');
  wrap.innerHTML='';
  const cols=['#dc2626','#16a34a','#fbbf24','#ec4899','#3b82f6','#f97316'];
  for(let i=0;i<60;i++){
    const c=document.createElement('div');
    c.className='cf';
    c.style.cssText=`left:${Math.random()*100}vw;background:${cols[Math.floor(Math.random()*cols.length)]};border-radius:${Math.random()>0.5?'50%':'2px'};width:${6+Math.random()*6}px;height:${6+Math.random()*6}px;animation-duration:${1.5+Math.random()*2}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*0.6}s`;
    wrap.appendChild(c);
  }
  setTimeout(()=>wrap.innerHTML='',3500);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
